channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Body Fat by Tasshroom
item.description: Body Fat - Stuff your face and save up those calories for the long journey ahead

item.title: GGBC's Repair
item.description: A very lightweight mod for balanced item repair. Compatible with ItemRarity, xSkills, and others

item.title: Stamina Mod
item.description: Adds stamina to animals. Exhaustion slows them. Tired predators give up the chase.

item.title: KCs Dragon Player!
item.description: Adds an anthropomorphic dragon player model to the game

item.title: VS Director
item.description: A director camera mod for video production workflows.（导演模式模组）

item.title: Vampirism
item.description: Become a creature of the night, drink blood, see in the dark and never touch silver again

item.title: VSNH Currency
item.description: Time Based Currency

item.title: VSNH Tweaks
item.description: Tweaks and modifications for the Vintage Story New Horizons server.

item.title: Craft Everything
item.description: Adds new crafting recipes for existing items in Vintage Story

item.title: ProjectL Interactables
item.description: Door, Keys, Trap everything to make a good labyrinth

item.title: Gearlock Firearms
item.description: Adds firearms powered by the gearlock mechanism

item.title: CB Guilds
item.description: Guild mod for my personal server

item.title: SheyderMod
item.description: A simple SheyderMod that supports the original artstyle of the game.

item.title: xSkills Fork
item.description: RPG-style skill system with abilities, perks, and progression.

item.title: CB Patches
item.description: JSON content patches for my small personal server

item.title: CB Harmony Patches
item.description: Harmony patches for my personal server.

item.title: FotSA Butchering Compat
item.description: Butchering compatibility for FotSA mods

item.title: Starless Skies
item.description: Removes the sun, moon, and sky, and changes shaders to cause absolute darkness

item.title: Riftworks
item.description: Interesting and useful lategame items and machines

item.title: Abyssal Depths
item.description: Expansion of ocean exploration. Diving suits and depth mechanics.

item.title: UI-Tweaks
item.description: Zoom Button, configurable HUD, in-game calculator, and more...

item.title: Nickelback
item.description: This mod gives you bits of metal back when a tool breaks during quenching

item.title: More animations
item.description: Better body and face animations

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: Vintage Story Chinese Language Pack
item.description: Vintage Story Chinese Language Pack（复古物语模组汉化包）

item.title: BetterTraders
item.description: Replaces vanilla traders with new trader structures.

item.title: BetterRuins
item.description: Adds many new ruins over and underground to your survival game world.

item.title: Bricks and Bloom Server Tweaks
item.description: Solves conflicts between various mods for the Bricks and Bloom server.

item.title: NDL ExpandedGrowth (Tree Growth Module)
item.description: Adds a method for growing larger variants of trees.

item.title: Alchemy
item.description: Potion mod that adds buffs to the player.
